title: Cavern Expansion
description: Cavern Expansion is a Vanilla style mod that expands on the caving experience.
body:
📖 About:

Cavern Expansion's main focus is expanding upon the Mining Experience. Despite being in early beta, the mod already adds a few ores, items, and more!
More features will be coming in the future!

 🧰 Dependencies:

This mod requires Fabric API.
